name: Atelier
description: Autonomous UI/UX Design Agent — generates, evaluates, and iterates on web UI candidates using a multi-judge consensus pipeline. Built on Google ADK 2.0, Gemini 2.5 Flash, and the Vertex AI platform.

schemes.description: Firebase Authentication ID token. Obtain via Firebase JS SDK signInWithPopup(), then call user.getIdToken().

skills.name: Generate UI from Brief
skills.description: Accepts a natural-language design brief and produces UI candidates (HTML/CSS) through a multi-stage pipeline: brief parsing → web research → source resolution → K=3 ensemble generation → 6 deterministic gates → D-O-R-A-V consensus scoring → best candidate selection.
examples: Build a SaaS analytics dashboard with a dark theme and KPI cards.
Design a brutalist landing page for a Bauhaus revival movement.
Create an accessible form for visually impaired users with screen reader support.

skills.name: Evaluate UI Quality
skills.description: Evaluates a UI candidate across 5 axes: Design fidelity, Originality, Relevance, Accessibility, Visual clarity (D-O-R-A-V). Returns a composite score and per-axis breakdown.

skills.name: DPO Tuning Cycle
skills.description: Mines preference pairs from past generation trajectories and submits a Vertex AI PREFERENCE_TUNING job to improve the generator model. Includes κ-gate evaluation for safe promotion.
